title: Planning for AGI and beyond
summary: Our mission is to ensure that artificial general intelligence—AI systems that are generally smarter than humans—benefits all of humanity.
summaryZh: 我们的使命是确保通用人工智能-人工智能系统通常比人类更聪明-造福全人类。
highlights: Our mission is to ensure that artificial general intelligence—AI systems that are generally smarter than humans—benefits all of humanity.
highlightsZh: 我们的使命是确保通用人工智能-人工智能系统通常比人类更聪明-造福全人类。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。

title: How should AI systems behave, and who should decide?
titleZh: 人工智能系统应该如何表现，应该由谁来决定？
summary: We’re clarifying how ChatGPT’s behavior is shaped and our plans for improving that behavior, allowing more user customization, and getting more public input into our decision-making in these areas.
summaryZh: 我们正在澄清ChatGPT的行为是如何形成的，以及我们改善这种行为的计划，允许更多的用户定制，并为我们在这些领域的决策提供更多的公众意见。
highlights: We’re clarifying how ChatGPT’s behavior is shaped and our plans for improving that behavior, allowing more user customization, and getting more public input into our decision-makin
highlightsZh: 我们正在澄清ChatGPT的行为是如何形成的，以及我们改善这种行为的计划，允许更多的用户定制，并为我们在这些领域的决策提供更多的公众意见。

title: Introducing ChatGPT Plus
summary: We’re launching a pilot subscription plan for ChatGPT, a conversational AI that can chat with you, answer follow-up questions, and challenge incorrect assumptions.
summaryZh: 我们正在推出ChatGPT的试点订阅计划，这是一种对话式人工智能，可以与您聊天、回答后续问题并挑战错误的假设。
highlights: We’re launching a pilot subscription plan for ChatGPT, a conversational AI that can chat with you, answer follow-up questions, and challenge incorrect assumptions.
highlightsZh: 我们正在推出ChatGPT的试点订阅计划，这是一种对话式人工智能，可以与您聊天、回答后续问题并挑战错误的假设。
